name: Win-rate side panel with insight tip
description: /quotes has a side panel showing win rate, biggest pending quote, and a contextual tip ('Quotes sent on Tuesdays close 24% faster'). Insight should rotate based on real data, not be static.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Curious whether his pricing is sticking. Glances at the side panel.

preconditions: Account has at least 30 decided quotes (won + lost) over the past 90 days

steps.expect: Side panel: Win rate %, biggest pending quote ($value, client), and 1 insight tip
Breakdown: won X / decided Y; trend arrow vs prior 90 days

steps.action: Refreshes the page on a different day
steps.expect: Insight tip is data-derived (different over time), not a hardcoded copy string

evaluationCriteria.check: Win rate is the largest number on the panel; everything else is supporting
Insight tip feels insightful, not a fortune cookie ('You sent 3 quotes today' is weak — 'Quotes you send before 10am close 18% more often' is strong)
If <10 decided quotes, panel shows 'Not enough data yet' instead of a misleading rate
Trend arrow is paired with text ('up 5pts vs last quarter'), not arrow-alone
